return O end,function(q)local T,G=613056-613055,q[423639-423638]while G do o[G],T=o[G]-(-938141-(-938142)),(-874041-(-874042))+T if 760531+-760531==o[G]then o[G],I[G]=nil,nil end G=q[T]end end,function(q,T)local D=Z(T)local O=function(O,B,C,V)return G(q,{O,B;C,V},T,D)end return O end,function()j=j+(-577080+577081)o[j]=580354-580353 return j end return(t(9116464-(-455977),{}))(D(l))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[T(-602029-(-567052))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
